snippet.title: Lanterns | Official Teaser 2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Are you afraid?  
#Lanterns premieres August 16 on HBO Max.

About HBO Max:
HBO Max is the premier global streaming platform from Warner Bros. Discovery that delivers the most unique and captivating stories, ranging from the highest quality in scripted programming, movies, documentaries, true crime, adult animation, and live sports and news (where available). HBO Max is the destination for prestigious entertainment brands such as HBO, Warner Bros., Max Originals, DC, Harry Potter, as well as iconic shows like “Friends” and “The Big Bang Theory,” all in one place.

GET HBO MAX
https://hbomax.com/

FOLLOW HBO MAX

snippet.title: Montreal Canadiens at Buffalo Sabres
snippet.description: The Sabres and Canadiens clash in Buffalo for a winner-take-all Game 7 postseason showdown. Buffalo leans on Rasmus Dahlin after his franchise-record 5-point performance, while Montreal leans on rookie Ivan Demidov to secure a massive road upset.

localized.title: Montreal Canadiens at Buffalo Sabres
localized.description: The Sabres and Canadiens clash in Buffalo for a winner-take-all Game 7 postseason showdown. Buffalo leans on Rasmus Dahlin after his franchise-record 5-point performance, while Montreal leans on rookie Ivan Demidov to secure a massive road upset.

snippet.title: Dominic Fike - Babydoll
snippet.description:
🎵 Follow the official 7clouds playlist on Spotify: http://spoti.fi/2SJsUcZ

🎧 Dominic Fike - Babydoll (Lyrics)
⏬ Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/track/7yNf9YjeO5JXUE3JEBgnYc?si=f038ceb6ccc44146
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!
❤️ Follow our Spotify playlists: http://bit.ly/7cloudsSpotify

💪 Workout Music: http://workout.7clouds.link

🎮 Gaming Music: http://gaming.7clouds.link

🌍 Best Pop Music: http://pop.7clouds.link

🤬 Hardstyle Music: http://hardstyle.7clouds.link

🥁 Drum & Bass: http://dnb.7clouds.link

🔊 Hyper Techno: http://techno.7clouds.link

😡 Phonk Music: http://phonk.7clouds.link

👉 Dominic Fike:
https://www.instagram.com/dominicfike/

https://twitter.com/dominicfike

https://www.youtube.com/@dominicfike

☁️ 7clouds:
https://open.spotify.com/user/7cloudsmusic

https://soundcloud.com/7cloudsmusic

https://audiomack.com/7cloudsmusic

https://facebook.com/7cloudsofficial

https://discord.com/invite/d5Arh8Y

https://twitter.com/7cloudsmusic

https://instagram.com/7clouds

https://tiktok.com/@7clouds

https://7clouds.org

.........
🎤 Lyrics:
I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down

Find me on Miami concrete
Lookin' for somebody different 'cause my daddy was a pimp
My mama had her issues but I miss her anyway, oh, babydoll

Please don't call me for the wrong reasons
We both know exactly what I'm thinkin'
Weeks pass and I never grow tired
'Cause I never said never, and I barely ever lie

I'm on a road to an original place in outer space
I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone, or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go, oh, babydoll
I can't move on

And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down
.........
📷 Wallpaper: https://midjourney.com/

.........
📧 Contact / Demo Submissions: contact@7clouds.org

.........

........

snippet.title: Peddi Official Trailer (Telugu) | Ram Charan | Janhvi Kapoor | A R Rahman | Buchi Babu Sana
snippet.description:
His arena. His rules. 🔥
His game begins now ❤️‍🔥
 
#PEDDITrailer OUT NOW 💥

#PEDDI in cinemas worldwide on 4th June.
#GetReadyForPeddi 💥💥

Cast: Mega PowerStar Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor, Shiva Rajkumar, Jagapathi Babu, Divyendu Sharma

Technical Crew:
Writer, Director: Buchi Babu Sana
Presents: Mythri Movie Makers, Sukumar Writings
Banner: Vriddhi Cinemas
Producer: Venkata Satish Kilaru
Co-producer: Ishan Saksena
Music Director: AR Rahman
DOP: Ratnavelu ISC
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Design: Avinash Kolla
Choreographer: Bosco Martis
Executive Producer: V. Y. Praveen Kumar
VFX Supervisor - Sanath PC
Marketing: First Show
Music Label: T-Series
DI: Annapurna Studios

#RamCharan #JanhviKapoor #ARRahman #BuchiBabuSana #VriddhiCinemas

snippet.title: Cleveland Guardians at Detroit Tigers
snippet.description: The Guardians and Tigers start a four-game series at Comerica Park. Slade Cecconi is the projected right-handed starter for Cleveland while Framber Valdez starts for Detroit. Dillon Dingler has eight home runs and a .241 average for the Tigers.

localized.title: Cleveland Guardians at Detroit Tigers
localized.description: The Guardians and Tigers start a four-game series at Comerica Park. Slade Cecconi is the projected right-handed starter for Cleveland while Framber Valdez starts for Detroit. Dillon Dingler has eight home runs and a .241 average for the Tigers.

snippet.title: LANTERNS TRAILER: Sinestro, Guy Gardner Green Lantern & Superman Man Of Tomorrow
snippet.description:
Lanterns Trailer 2026. Lanterns Episode 1, Hal Jordan vs Sinestro, Guy Gardner Green Lantern, Superman Man Of Tomorrow Teaser, New DCU Justice League John Stewart & Green Lantern Corps ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
The Boys Season 5 Episode 7 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L8hvaCAyopQ&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczzDVHUrq_EeqCBhLjzXfKlR&index=1&t=394s&pp=iAQB0gcJCQQLAYcqIYzvsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Cinemacon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XnbV1nunjzk&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&&pp=iAQBsAgC
Clayface Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bZVn_fVn7SY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQB0gcJCdQKAYcqIYzvsAgC
Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDrWFxkhCuA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
The Boys Season 5 Episode 5 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6CQNBDL5jRg&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczzDVHUrq_EeqCBhLjzXfKlR&index=2&t=1s&pp=iAQBsAgC
Invincible Season 4 Episode 8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h1p_sVexsKA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxJXJRwmzIBW9nsgB9Qu_lc&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Daredevil Born Again Season 2 Episode 8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aum5ef2fTaE&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6ZVnOQ8DmFI&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC 
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering new Green Lantern Lanterns Trailer. New Episodes First Look, Hal Jordan, John Stewart, Guy Gardner Nathan Fillion. Hal Jordan vs Sinestro First Look. Green Lantern HBO Episodes explained. Lanterns Season 1, story and plot, how it connects to the Superman 2 Man of Tomorrow Movie and other upcoming DC Movies.

James Gunn DC Movies New Justice League Announcement, Canceled DC Movies and TV Shows recently. Zack Snyder and James Gunn meeting. Superman 2, Green Lantern HBO First Look, Teen Titans Movie announcement. The new Batman and other new DC movies & tv shows.

Lanterns is supposed to run for multiple seasons, and help to build out the cosmic side of the DCU like the Supergirl Movie and other future space based dc movies and tv shows. There will be other major DC characters cameo scenes on the show, Nathan Fillion Guy Gardner, other green lanterns, Oa and the Oans. In addition to Sinestro and  other comic book characters.

David Corenswet Superman, Rachel Brosnahan Lois Lane Explained. Batman Brave and the Bold Teaser and the New Batman will be announced next year. Batman Brave and the Bold Teaser and the New Batman will be announced next year. Nathan Fillion Green Lantern, Hawkgirl, Mr Terrific and more new Justice League characters. Why The New Justice League is based more on the Animated Justice League Team.

Jason Momoa Lobo Explained. Henry Cavill Superman Future Plans, Deleted Scenes. Lots more DC and Marvel Trailers coming Supergirl Trailer 2026, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, and Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon too!

I'll do more Lanterns Trailer videos for Green Lantern DCU Episodes as they begin releasing more officially!

snippet.title: Character Trailer - "Nicole: An Epic Adventure Story" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #Nicole
snippet.description:
Writing a full story is nothing like putting together a Teyvat travelogue. You cannot just write the exciting bits and hand-wave the route and background.
"Even the miserable parts of the trip and the worldbuilding no one wants to deal with are important!" That sounds like something Mr. Nine would say.

snippet.title: Washington Mystics at Dallas Wings
snippet.description: The Mystics tip off against the Wings at College Park Center. The game features Dallas' Paige Bueckers and Azzi Fudd hosting 2025 All-Star Sonia Citron. Washington has won five of the last six games over the 2024 and 2025 seasons.

localized.title: Washington Mystics at Dallas Wings
localized.description: The Mystics tip off against the Wings at College Park Center. The game features Dallas' Paige Bueckers and Azzi Fudd hosting 2025 All-Star Sonia Citron. Washington has won five of the last six games over the 2024 and 2025 seasons.

snippet.title: HOPE - Official Teaser - In Theaters Fall 2026
snippet.description: In the remote South Korea village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok (Hwang Jung- min) and officer Sung-ae (Hoyeon) are called to find a mysterious creature that has wreaked havoc on the village.  In the nearby forest, a coterie of hunters, including Sung- ki (Zo In-Sung) set out to track the beast and find themselves hunted instead. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.

localized.title: HOPE - Official Teaser - In Theaters Fall 2026
localized.description: In the remote South Korea village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok (Hwang Jung- min) and officer Sung-ae (Hoyeon) are called to find a mysterious creature that has wreaked havoc on the village.  In the nearby forest, a coterie of hunters, including Sung- ki (Zo In-Sung) set out to track the beast and find themselves hunted instead. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.

snippet.title: The Jerk
snippet.description: A simpleton (Steve Martin) leaves his foster family, acquires a girlfriend (Bernadette Peters) and invents slip-proof eyeglasses.

snippet.title: Skyrim's Strangest Artifact EXPOSED 14 Years Later
snippet.description: The Elder Scrolls 5: Skyrim features an assortment of unique masks from its cast of Dragon Priests, however one such artifact is paticullarly strange. Konahrik, a mysterious helm earned through the completion of a bizarre easter egg is clearly special and has earned the attention of an assortment of mysterious factions. Today we investigate!

snippet.title: The Comic Book Murder
snippet.description: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

snippet.title: Team USA Celebration: Apolo and Bianca
snippet.description: "The Wall" celebrates NBC's Tokyo Olympic Games; two-time gold medalist speed skater Apolo Ohno and his fiancée, Bianca Stam, take on the wall to raise money for the Team USA Fund, supporting future Olympic and Paralympic athletes.
